schedule: before 09:00 on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: This is a plugin scaffold (composer type: project) with a committed composer.lock and no runtime dependencies of its own — every Composer and npm dependency is dev/build tooling. Automerge minor & patch once CI (PHPUnit + PHPStan + PHPCS + commitlint) is green.
GitHub Actions: group into one PR, pin to commit SHAs, and automerge minor/patch/digest.
Major bumps always need a human — never automerge, and flag them.
